introSection: Spinning Racer is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Maurer Söhne.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster operated in Germany until the Oktoberfest in Munich 2019. It was owned by German showwomen Inge & Angela Bruch.

In 2020, it was acquired by British fairground company Mellors Group.

On 26 February 2021 it was announced that the coaster would operate at Fantasy Island.

The coaster was subsequently relocated to Saudi Arabia where it operated at the Riyadh Winter Wonderland. It operated at South Sabahiya Park in Kuwait from 12 December 2023 to 2025.

In December 2025, following the announcement that Mellors Group had acquired Lightwater Valley in Ripon, North Yorkshire, England, UK, Spinning Racer appeared on site at the park. The coaster was subsequently reassembled in the park by February 2026. It is expected to open in 2026.

fullText:
Spinning Racer is a travelling steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Maurer Söhne.

The coaster operated in Germany until the Oktoberfest in Munich 2019. It was owned by German showwomen Inge & Angela Bruch.

In 2020, it was acquired by British fairground company Mellors Group.

On 26 February 2021 it was announced that the coaster would operate at Fantasy Island.

The coaster was subsequently relocated to Saudi Arabia where it operated at the Riyadh Winter Wonderland. It operated at South Sabahiya Park in Kuwait from 12 December 2023 to 2025.

In December 2025, following the announcement that Mellors Group had acquired Lightwater Valley in Ripon, North Yorkshire, England, UK, Spinning Racer appeared on site at the park. The coaster was subsequently reassembled in the park by February 2026. It is expected to open in 2026.
